about.title: About RAG Knowledge Base
about.heroDesc: Next-generation intelligent knowledge management powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation
about.systemIntroDesc: Explore the core capabilities and value of RAG Knowledge Base
about.ragDesc: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) is an advanced AI architecture that combines information retrieval with Large Language Models (LLMs). It retrieves relevant information from knowledge bases and provides it as context to LLMs, generating more accurate, reliable, and traceable answers.
about.ragHighlight: Solves LLM hallucination, providing verifiable answer sources
about.enterpriseSecurityDesc: On-premises deployment ensures data stays within corporate servers. Fine-grained access control and audit trails meet enterprise compliance requirements.
about.highPerfSearchDesc: Vector database and semantic indexing enable millisecond-level knowledge retrieval. Supports fuzzy search, semantic understanding, and multi-modal retrieval.
about.teamCollabDesc: Multi-user collaborative editing, version control, and commenting. Knowledge can be organized by department or project for structured management.
about.featuresDetailDesc: Explore every powerful feature module of the system
about.useCasesDesc: Applicable to various enterprise knowledge management scenarios
about.useCaseEnterpriseKbDesc: Build a unified enterprise knowledge management platform, integrating scattered documentation
about.useCaseSmartServiceDesc: AI-powered customer service system based on knowledge base, providing 7x24 intelligent Q&A
about.useCaseDocMgmtDesc: Multi-format document storage, preview, search, and version control
about.useCaseProjectKbDesc: Centralized project documentation and experience review to prevent knowledge loss
about.contactDesc: Any questions or suggestions? Feel free to reach out
about.formValidationWarning: Please fill in all required fields
about.formSubmitSuccess: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
about.featureDocMgmtDesc: Tree-structured file organization with unlimited nesting. Supports online preview of 50+ file formats including PDF, Word, Excel, Markdown, images, video, audio.
about.featureDocMgmtPt1: Tree hierarchy for flexible knowledge organization
about.featureDocMgmtPt2: Folders can be marked as KB with auto-generated metadata
about.featureDocMgmtPt4: Full CRUD operations with permission control
about.featureSearchDesc: Vector-based search technology understands user intent and delivers precise results. Supports full-text search, semantic similarity matching, and hybrid modes.
about.featureSearchPt1: Vector semantic search, understands query intent
about.featureAiParseDesc: Advanced PDF parsing engine auto-extracts document structure and content. OCR support for scanned documents and image-based PDFs.
about.featureAiParsePt3: Batch processing of large document sets
about.featureYamlMetaDesc: Auto-generate and maintain YAML description files with KB info, document lists, and descriptions. Enables Agentic RAG integration.
about.featureYamlMetaPt2: Records document name, description, and path
about.featureYamlMetaPt4: Easy for AI Agent to read and understand
about.featureRestApiDesc: Complete RESTful API for third-party integration. All features available via API calls for automated workflows.
about.featureEntSecurityDesc: On-premises deployment ensures data security with user authentication and permission control. All operations logged for audit compliance.

aboutProject.title: Project Info
aboutProject.subtitle: RAG Knowledge Base — Intelligent Knowledge Management System
aboutProject.overviewText: RAG Knowledge Base is an intelligent knowledge management system based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology. It helps users efficiently manage, search, and utilize knowledge resources by combining LLM generation with precise knowledge retrieval for intelligent Q&A, document parsing, and knowledge discovery.
